steps: Log in to your Clearbit account (accounts created 2023 or earlier)
Your Secret API Key is displayed — click the eye icon to reveal it, then the copy icon to copy it
Use the key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header
notes: Clearbit was acquired by HubSpot in late 2023 and rebranded as Breeze Intelligence — new accounts created in 2024 or later may not have standalone API key access
For legacy accounts, only account Admins can view API keys
Requests are charged per lookup based on your plan
The API key is used as a Bearer token: Authorization: Bearer sk_...

test_endpoint.description: Look up Stripe's company data to verify credentials
